name: ChatGPT
tagline: The world's most powerful AI chatbot
description: ChatGPT is an AI-powered language model developed by OpenAI, capable of generating human-like text based on context and past conversations. It helps with a wide variety of tasks including writing, coding, and brainstorming.

name: Midjourney
tagline: Create beautiful AI-generated images from text
description: Midjourney is a generative AI program that creates images from natural language descriptions, known as 'prompts'. It operates entirely within Discord and is renowned for its highly artistic and stylized outputs.

name: DALL-E 3
tagline: High-fidelity image generation by OpenAI
description: DALL-E 3 is the latest image generation model from OpenAI, built natively into ChatGPT. It understands significantly more nuance and detail than previous systems, allowing users to easily translate their ideas.

name: Runway ML
tagline: Everything you need to make anything you want
description: Runway is an applied AI research company shaping the next era of art, entertainment and human creativity. They provide a suite of tools for video generation, editing, and effects.

name: ElevenLabs
tagline: Generative Voice AI
description: ElevenLabs provides the most realistic AI text-to-speech currently available on the market. It lets creators generate highly expressive, high-quality audio in multiple voices and languages.

name: GitHub Copilot
tagline: Your AI pair programmer
description: GitHub Copilot works alongside you in your editor, suggesting whole lines or entire functions. It is powered by OpenAI's Codex model, trained on billions of lines of public code.

name: Jasper AI
tagline: AI copywriter for enterprise marketing teams
description: Jasper is an artificial intelligence copilot designed specifically for enterprise marketing teams to create content tailored for their brand. It can write blog posts, ad copy, emails, and landing page content.

name: Copy.ai
tagline: Whatever you want to ask, our chat has the answers
description: Copy.ai is an AI writing tool designed to help marketers, bloggers, and entrepreneurs generate high-quality copy in seconds. It provides hundreds of templates for various use cases.

name: Notion AI
tagline: Work faster. Write better. Think bigger.
description: Notion AI is integrated directly into the Notion workspace, helping you summarize notes, rewrite text, or brainstorm ideas without leaving your docs.

name: Canva AI
tagline: Magic Studio brings AI to your design process
description: Canva incorporates AI through its 'Magic Studio' suite, allowing users to magically transform their designs, generate images from text, and remove backgrounds with one click.

name: Perplexity AI
tagline: Where knowledge begins
description: Perplexity is a conversational AI search engine that provides direct answers to your questions, backed by real-time web citations. Rather than giving you a list of links, it synthesizes an answer.

name: Claude AI
tagline: A next-generation AI assistant by Anthropic
description: Claude is built by Anthropic with a focus on safety, helpfulness, and harmlessness. It excels at tasks that require nuance, large context windows, and complex reasoning.

name: Gemini
tagline: Google's largest and most capable AI model
description: Gemini is Google's multimodal AI system, capable of understanding and reasoning across text, code, audio, image, and video. It is integrated throughout the Google ecosystem.

name: Synthesia
tagline: Create professional videos from text in minutes
description: Synthesia allows you to create videos with highly realistic AI avatars by simply typing text. It's an excellent tool for generating corporate training videos, marketing content, and localized presentations.

name: Descript
tagline: There's a new way to make video and podcasts
description: Descript fundamentally changes audio and video editing by letting you edit media by editing the transcribed text. It features powerful AI tools for removing filler words like 'um' and 'uh'.

name: Luma AI
tagline: Capture in 3D, Generate in 3D
description: Luma AI enables you to capture photorealistic 3D models using just your smartphone, and generate 3D assets from text. Their Dream Machine model also brings text-to-video capabilities.

name: Gamma.app
tagline: A new medium for presenting ideas
description: Gamma uses AI to help you create beautiful, engaging presentations, webpages, and documents in seconds. You start with a prompt, and Gamma builds out a full deck with customized styling.

name: Tome
tagline: The AI-powered storytelling format
description: Tome goes beyond static presentations to create interactive, dynamic stories generated natively by AI. Users can embed interactive prototypes, 3D renderings, and live web pages.

name: Framer AI
tagline: Start your next website in seconds
description: Framer's AI features allow you to generate a first draft of a fully responsive, functional website from a simple text description. It handles layout, color palettes, and copywriting automatically.

name: Cursor
tagline: The AI-first Code Editor
description: Cursor is a fork of VS Code built entirely around AI, designed to help you code and understand software faster. It features a powerful codebase-aware chat and multi-line autofill.
